title: Deluxe Paws Newborn Baby Boy or Girl Eco Plush (16cm Baby Boy)
features: These eco-friendly baby bears are manufactured and stuffed with 100% recycled polyester from plastic waste. Weighted with recycled glass beads, this toy has been perfectly designed for hugging by a loving new friend.
This beautiful soft toy was designed and manufactured to the highest quality. It fully conforms to European safety standards EN71 and is hand washable
description: Product Description Sustainably Made Manufactured and filled using only recycled materials to reduce environmental impact A Meaningful Gift Ideal for newborns, baby showers, or eco-minded families looking to introduce sustainability from day one Hug-Perfect Design The video showcases the product in use.
